banner.intro: A heat episode is flagged for {{name}}. A few simple habits help get through the day cool.
banner.introNoName: A heat episode is flagged. A few simple habits help get through the day cool.

checklist.title: What helps
items: Close shutters and windows during the hottest hours, air out early morning and evening.
Offer drinks regularly, even without thirst (water, cold soups, fruit).
Keep one cool room and invite the person to spend time there.
Light, fresh meals, cool the skin (damp cloth, water spray).
Watch for warning signs (headache, unusual tiredness, confusion, little urine). When in doubt, call emergency services.

section.title: Heat monitoring
section.intro: During a heat episode, OpenCare shows the right habits on the dashboard and the kiosk, and sends hydration reminders to caregivers.
section.enable: Enable heat monitoring for this circle
section.enableHint: Once enabled, you can declare an episode in one tap when the heat rises.
section.reminderTimesHint: Times at which caregivers get a reminder during an active episode.
